preview-desc.text: A playful trailer for Spinach shown in association with TIFF, parodying a familiar fairytale studio opening.
Full brand identity for NOMA, a small-batch Norwegian aquavit distillery — mark, type, colour, and guidelines from first principles.
Multi-channel brand campaign for Meridian Bank — art direction, OOH, digital, and social across six European markets.
A 12-minute observational film about light, salt flats, and the hour before dark. Shot on 16mm over three days in southern Spain.
A 38-minute essay film about a coastal community's relationship with a river system changed beyond recognition.
Art direction and typography for the Aperture Annual — a 240-page photography annual combining long-form criticism, portfolios, and conversation.
Identity and spatial design for Shifting Ground, a group exhibition of twelve international sculptors at Kunsthalle Oslo.
A multi-sensory spatial installation exploring the boundary between physical and digital presence.
Main title sequence for Parallax, a six-part science fiction series — motion design, typography, and 3D visual language for the opening two minutes.
Twenty-four portraits made on the Outer Hebrides at the end of summer — silver gelatin prints from 35mm negatives, shot over six weeks.
Full design process for Vessel, a personal finance app — research through production across twelve weeks with a four-person team.
Design system for Atlas, a B2B analytics platform — component library, design tokens, documentation, and contribution model for a team of forty.
A short documentary about presence, stillness, and the landscape of the inner Hardangervidda.
